reviews.review_description: It is broken, you do have to wait over 1 min after launch to get into screen, where you the see choices for several size videos but there is no way to get any of them to stream or download. Seems the tracking of the controller is off, and it never detects the choice. Sort of crazy to take the time to put this up at all, and never even check in over a week, to fix it. It really seems the GO on general is being given up on since the Quest launch. That's too bad, (I have both, but the GO, still can do awesome stuff) so hopefully this will not be the case
It looked very promising at first, but like all the other reviewers so far I could not stream or download any of it.
